category_sources: Official README notes IPMItool manages and configures IPMI-enabled devices.
source_facts.description says ipmitool is a utility for IPMI control with kernel driver or LAN interface.
display_name_sources: The official project has historically branded the project as IPMItool; source_facts.homepage is https://codeberg.org/IPMITool/ipmitool.
docs_sources: Former official README notes the project moved to Codeberg at https://codeberg.org/IPMITool/ipmitool and references the bundled ipmitool manpage.
source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg repository and best current official documentation surface.
repo_sources: Former official SourceForge README says the project moved to Codeberg at https://codeberg.org/IPMITool/ipmitool.
source_facts.repo is empty, and source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg source-control project URL.
tags_sources: Official README describes monitoring, logging, inventory, and control of hardware through IPMI-enabled devices.
source_facts.description identifies IPMI control over kernel driver or LAN interface.
